childhood.familyBackground: Born July 14, 1950. Full name is Grandhi Mallikarjuna Rao. Came from middle-class background.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 1950년 7월 14일 출생. 전명은 Grandhi Mallikarjuna Rao. 중산층 배경.
childhood.education: Mechanical engineer education; failed Class 10th initially but resumed studies
childhood.educationKo: 기계 엔지니어 교육; 처음에 10학년 시험에 떨어졌으나 교육 재개
childhood.earlyLife: Initially assisted family business. Overcame early setback to become engineering student. Started in paper mill.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 처음에는 가족 사업 보조. 초기 좌절 극복하여 엔지니어링 학생 됨. 제지소에서 시작.

careerTimeline.event: Founded GMR Group by acquiring distressed jute mill
careerTimeline.eventKo: 경영난을 겪는 황마 방직 공장을 인수하여 GMR 그룹 설립

careerTimeline.event: Expanded into highways and energy infrastructure
Won contract to develop and operate Delhi's Indira Gandhi International Airport
careerTimeline.eventKo: 델리 인디라 간디 국제공항 개발 및 운영 계약 체결

careerTimeline.event: GMR operates 4 major airports in India; group operates in 7 countries
careerTimeline.eventKo: GMR이 인도 4대 공항 운영; 그룹은 7개국에서 운영

quotes.text: Warren Buffett's approach to giving back to society inspired my philanthropic vision.
quotes.textKo: 워렌 버핏의 사회 환원 접근 방식이 내 자선 비전을 영감주었습니다.
quotes.context: On his commitment to charitable causes

personalTraits.knownFor: Building GMR Group into infrastructure giant, airport operations, overcoming adversity
personalTraits.knownForKo: GMR 그룹을 인프라 거대기업으로 구축, 공항 운영, 역경 극복
personalTraits.philanthropy: 1,540 crore rupees donated for charitable causes in 2012
